summary: Contextual OG Meta Tags for Short URLs - All 14 tests PASSED. Verified congrats/birthday/anniversary/thankyou/welcome/holiday cards show customer photo and contextual titles, review requests show store logo with 'Share Your Experience' title, business cards show salesperson photo with '[Name]'s Digital Card' title.
critical_code_review_comments: short_urls.py lines 381-470 correctly implements contextual OG tag generation based on link_type
Crawler detection uses comprehensive list: facebookexternalhit, twitterbot, linkedinbot, slackbot, whatsapp, telegrambot, applebot, iframely, embedly, bot, crawler, spider, preview
Customer names are properly title-cased using .strip().title()
Card types handled: congrats_card, birthday_card, thank_you_card, thankyou_card, holiday_card, welcome_card, anniversary_card
OG image priority for cards: customer photo_url > generated card image > store logo
OG image dimensions set correctly: 1080x1350 for generated cards, 800x800 for photos/logos
og:description format: 'From {salesman_name} at {store_name}' when both available
seed_data_creation: None - used existing short codes: j2YYxc (congrats_card), ESTvPu (birthday_card), yrj7rS (review_request), AqCPAn (business_card)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contextual OG tags fully implemented for short URL redirects. Key short codes tested: j2YYxc (congrats_card - 'Congrats Forest!'), ESTvPu (birthday_card - 'Happy Birthday Forest!'), yrj7rS (review_request - 'Share Your Experience with i'M On social'), AqCPAn (business_card - 'Forest Admin's Digital Card'). All card types use customer photo from photo_url field. Review requests use store logo via /api/s/og-image/{user_id} endpoint. Business cards use salesperson photo. Normal browsers get 302 redirect, crawlers get 200 HTML with OG tags.

features_verified.congrats_card_og_title: PASS - 'Congrats Forest!' with title-cased customer name
features_verified.birthday_card_og_title: PASS - 'Happy Birthday Forest!' with first name

features_verified.review_request_og_title: PASS - 'Share Your Experience with i'M On social'
features_verified.browser_302_redirect: PASS - All 4 link types return 302 to original URL
features_verified.crawler_200_html: PASS - All 4 link types return HTML with OG tags
features_verified.crawler_user_agents: PASS - 13 different crawler user-agents all get HTML response
features_verified.fallback_behavior: PASS - Short URLs without reference_id gracefully fall back to 'Check this out!'
